story: Coda and Malik have been jumping earlier and earlier to publish first. Hawking warns Coda each jump worsens the timeline; a few more could snap causality.  In the lab, the green orb thrums at charge. Shaken but still chasing a win, Coda programs a leap to beat Malik by three days. Across the city, Malik’s models show exponential fractures; he sprints toward Coda’s lab clutching a tablet of proof, intent on stopping the next jump.
implausible_knowledge: he sprints toward Coda’s lab clutching a tablet of proof, intent on stopping the next jump
question: At the console, what will Coda do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Pause the sequence and wait to hear Malik’s warning and examine the data.
answer_without_knowledge: Initiate the jump to outrun Malik by three days.
